title: Archive Chapter IV
subtitle: The Sablewood Chronicle
description: An eternal record of the age of shadows, where every deed is inked in blood and every silence speaks of the fallen.

events.title: Arrival at Sablewood
events.description: The party arrived at the gates of Sablewood, seeking refuge from the storm. The guards were suspicious but eventually let them in after a brief interrogation.

pcNotes.note: The guards seemed more afraid of something inside the woods than us outside. I should keep an eye on them.

events.title: Meeting the Elder
events.description: An audience with Elder Thorne was granted. He tasked the party with investigating the recent disappearances near the old ruins.

events.title: Ambush at the Ruins
events.description: While investigating the ruins, the party was ambushed by a pack of shadow-wolves. They barely managed to fend them off.

pcNotes.note: My spells barely singed their fur. They are resistant to fire. We need a new strategy.

events.title: Discovery of the Amulet
events.description: Deep within the ruins, an ancient amulet pulsing with strange energy was found hidden beneath a stone altar.

events.title: The Shadow Broker's Deal
events.description: In the damp cellars beneath the town, a masked figure offered information in exchange for the amulet. The party hesitated.

events.title: Betrayal in the Ranks
events.description: A trusted scout vanished into the night, taking half the party's rations and the only map to the inner sanctum.

pcNotes.note: I knew it. I should have slept with one eye open. Now we are blind in the dark.

events.title: The Hidden Sanctuary
events.description: Following a series of cryptic markings, the group uncovered a hidden sanctuary untouched by the creeping shadows.

events.title: The Blood Eclipse
events.description: The sky turned crimson as the Blood Eclipse began, an event foretold to awaken dormant ancient magic.

events.title: Closing the Void Rift
events.description: Using the amulet's resonance, the party successfully collapsed the rift, halting the shadow invasion just as the eclipse reached its zenith.

pcNotes.note: The magical backlash was deafening. I can still hear the screams of the void, but at least the rift is shut.
